data.body:
Goal:
Expose scope metadata through Knots projections so clients can read it from `KnotView` and fast list/index paths without fully rehydrating every knot.

Verification:
1. Create or update a knot with scope metadata.
2. Run `kno -C ~/knots show <id>` and confirm scope appears in the returned view/output.
3. Run `kno -C ~/knots ls` or the relevant indexed listing path and confirm scope metadata is available where the API expects it.
4. Run `cargo test` from ~/knots.

Constraints:
Prefer nullable columns in `knot_hot` or a structured `scope_json` column, whichever best fits current Knots projection patterns. Include scope in `idx.knot_head` if that is the fast head document used by Foolery.
data.title: Project scope into knot views
